Package minet.loss

Class MeanSquaredError

  • java.lang.Object
    • minet.loss.MeanSquaredError
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Loss
    public class MeanSquaredError
extends java.lang.Object
implements Loss
    A class for computing mean squared error loss

      • forward

        public double forward​(org.jblas.DoubleMatrix Y,
                      org.jblas.DoubleMatrix Yhat)
        Compute a loss value given groud-truth Y and estimate Yhat
        Specified by:
        forward in interface Loss
        Parameters:
        Y - a [minibatch_size x d] matrix, each row is the ground-truth of an instance
        Yhat - a [minibatch_size x d] matrix, each row is an estimate of an instance
        Returns:
        a double
